narrative:
Auburn Twp (precinct in Crawford County) has 458 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.3 percentage points.
